selection_basis.ledger_reason: This was the next strong active sibling after the entropy support reduction.
selection_basis.bounded_goal: Reduce the active A1 campaign and graveyard-validity doctrine into a smaller controller-usable fence set without rereading raw A1 doctrine sources or promoting graveyard doctrine into lower-loop law.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Strongest next active sibling once campaign and graveyard doctrine are narrowed.
Strongest work-surface follow-on if the queue returns to export archaeology next.
Strongest later work-surface packet once the active A1 sequence pauses.

raw_source_reread_reason: Parent artifacts already isolate campaign doctrine, bridge-route evolution, graveyard-first validity, negative/operator control, and normalization deferral needed for this bounded reduction.

candidate_items.name: FAMILY_PATH_CAMPAIGN_IS_A1_UNIT_OF_WORK
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent packet's most reusable doctrine rule for how active A1 is supposed to operate.

candidate_items.name: FIRST_SUBSTRATE_AND_ENTROPY_CAMPAIGNS_STAY_DISTINCT
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps the first-family scaffold separation and avoids premature lane widening.

candidate_items.name: DIRECT_ENTROPY_OBJECTIVE_WITH_COLDER_EXECUTABLE_ROUTE_SPLIT
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent packet's sharpest contradiction between conceptual target and executable route.

candidate_items.name: BROAD_RESCUE_PRESSURE_IS_REAL_BUT_DIRECT_STRUCTURE_STAYS_PROPOSAL_SIDE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Compresses the route-history spine and direct-structure nonlanding into one bounded rule.

candidate_items.name: GRAVEYARD_FIRST_VALIDITY_IS_STRICTER_THAN_SCAFFOLD_PROOF
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent packet's strongest validity-doctrine distinction.

candidate_items.name: GRAVEYARD_AND_NEGATIVE_CLASSES_ARE_CONTROL_INFRA_NOT_TRUTH_PROMOTION
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps the graveyard/operator doctrine operational without overpromoting it into earned law.

quarantined_items.name: CLASSICAL_ENGINE_RESIDUE_OR_GRAVEYARD_OCCUPANCY_AS_DIRECT_PROMOTION
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent repeatedly treats classical engine names as rescue quarry and negative library rather than direct earned executable targets.

quarantined_items.name: CAMPAIGN_DOCTRINE_AS_ALREADY_FULLY_NORMALIZED_LIVE_FAMILY_OUTPUT
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent explicitly defers full normalization and anti-overclaim discipline to later integration and rosetta surfaces.

notes: This batch preserves active A1 campaign and graveyard-validity doctrine as a proposal-only controller fence set rather than lower-loop truth.
No raw source reread and no active append-save were performed.
